reason: Defines required Neovim headless startup checks and UI/plugin review checklist.
Check that the lualine change preserves plugin UI option ownership and lazy.nvim spec style.
Check optional LSP/git/plugin APIs are guarded and do not break startup.
Check the change stays scoped to the statusline owner and does not touch unrelated tabline/config files.
Check implemented behavior matches the selected gruvbox-material adapted Eviline approach.
